name: Pan Roast of Celery Root, Carrots, Bacon and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 3 large cloves garlic, thinly sliced lengthwise
4 cups thinly sliced green or Napa cabbage
3 tablespoons chopped parsley and chopped chives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, heat the oil over moderately high heat.
2. Add the bacon and cook until browned and crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels.
3. Pour off and discard all but 2 tablespoons of fat remaining in the pan.
4. Add the celery root, carrots, and garlic. Sauté until crisp tender and lightly browned. Remove and keep warm.
5. Add the cabbage and sauté quickly (2 minutes or so) until cabbage is bright green but still crisp.
6. Add the celery root mixture and bacon, tossing quickly with the cabbage.
7. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and vinegar.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley and chives.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
